full_text:
Lou Fa 婁發
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Lou Fa (婁發). Rebelled against Liu Zhang but was defeated and fled to Jing. Lou Fa was affiliated with Liu Yan and Liu Biao.
